transcript: 瑟t 瑟z 瑟n藞ka蕣nt蓹rd
definitions: To be met or found unexpectedly.
To be confronted with or experience something, often difficult or challenging.
To be faced with a situation or person.
examples: It is encountered frequently in the wild.
A problem is encountered when trying to open the file.
Resistance is encountered by the team.
